    • containsModalityOrQuery

      public static boolean containsModalityOrQuery(Term term)
      Checks if the given Term contains a modality, query, or update.
      Parameters:
      term - The Term to check.
      Returns:
      true contains at least one modality or query, false contains no modalities and no queries.
